body: ScarletCave online. Starting with schema foundation work (br-011). Will notify when pagination schemas are ready for downstream consumers.
BlueLake reporting in. Taking dashboard redesign (br-071) — no upstream blockers. ScarletCave, I'll need the pagination schemas for the transactions list page later.
CoralBadger here. Picking up CI/CD pipeline (br-101). No file overlap with either of you. Will review your work when I finish.
Claiming br-011: pagination schemas. Reserving packages/shared-types/src/schemas/pagination.schema.ts and types/index.ts. ETA ~20 min.
br-011 complete. Pagination schemas ready: PaginatedRequestSchema (cursor + offset), PaginatedResponseSchema. Files released. Downstream beads unblocked.
Reviewed your pagination work. Clean implementation. Cursor and offset dual support is solid.
Claiming br-071: dashboard KPI redesign. Reserving apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/dashboard/ and components/dashboard/.
br-071 complete. Dashboard now has KPI cards (total balance, monthly spend, savings rate, goal progress) with responsive grid and skeleton loaders.
CI pipeline draft ready with Turbo remote caching, parallel test jobs per package, and build matrix. Still need to add deploy workflow.
